videos.headline: Beau Pribula explains how Missouri's win still offers areas to improve
videos.description: Pribula praises his teammates for their high-level play but stresses that even in victory, the No. 25 Tigers see areas to sharpen and continue improving their game.

videos.headline: Mizzou's Ahmad Hardy: 'Every time I get the ball I'm thinking touchdown'
videos.description: After setting career highs with 250 yards and three TDs in the No. 25 Tigers' big win, Hardy says both his run game and his touchdown celebrations come naturally.
